title: YueWang996/bard-pytorch-dynamics
abstract:
bard is a lightweight, PyTorch-native library for rigid-body dynamics that leverages tensor operations to perform efficient, batched computations on either the CPU or GPU. It provides a simple yet powerful API for loading robots from URDF files and analyzing their motion using standard robotics algorithms.

# bard: Batched Articulated Robot Dynamics [ ](https://github.com/YueWang996/bard/actions) [ ](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT) [ ](https://github.com/YueWang996/bard) [ ](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.31481) `bard` is a lightweight, PyTorch-native library for rigid-body dynamics that leverages tensor operations to perform efficient, batched computations on either the CPU or GPU. It provides a simple yet powerful API for loading robots from URDF files and analyzing their motion using standard robotics algorithms. The primary motivation behind `bard` is to provide a dynamics library that integrates seamlessly into modern machine learning workflows. By treating the robot's state and dynamics as a differentiable computation graph, it becomes an ideal tool for robotics research in areas like reinforcement learning, trajectory optimization, physics-informed learning, and system identification. ## Feature Comparison ✨ `bard` combines the best of both worlds: native PyTorch integration for ML workflows and comprehensive robotics algorithms. Here's how it compares to other state-of-the-art libraries: | Feature | bard (Ours) | Pinocchio | RBDL | pytorch_kinematics | |---------|:------:|:-----------:|:------:|:-------------------:| | **PyTorch Native** | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ | | **Batch Processing** | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ | | **GPU Acceleration** | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ | | **Auto-Differentiation (Autograd)** | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ | | **Floating-Base Support** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | | **Forward Kinematics** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | **Inverse Kinematics** | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | **Jacobian Calculation** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | | **Inverse Dynamics (RNEA)** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | | **Forward Dynamics (ABA)** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | | **Mass Matrix (CRBA)** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | | **URDF Parsing** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | **Key Advantages of bard:** - Seamlessly integrates with PyTorch-based ML pipelines - Efficient batched operations for training neural networks with thousands of parallel simulations - Full differentiability through robot dynami
abstract_zh: bard是一个轻量级的、PyTorch原生的刚体动力学库，它利用张量操作在CPU或GPU上执行高效的批量计算。该库提供简单而强大的API，可从URDF文件加载机器人，并使用标准机器人算法分析其运动。bard的主要动机是提供一个能无缝集成到现代机器学习工作流程中的动力学库。通过将机器人状态和动力学视为可微计算图，它成为强化学习、轨迹优化、物理信息学习和系统辨识等机器人研究领域的理想工具。
tldr_zh: 一个PyTorch原生、支持批量计算和GPU加速的刚体动力学库。
cover_zh: PyTorch原生动力学库｜批量计算+GPU加速，机器人研究起飞

judge.reason: PyTorch原生刚体动力学库，支持批处理、GPU加速和自动微分，适用于强化学习、轨迹优化等机器人研究。
